body:
## [3.34.0] - 2026-06-16

### Features

- add customizable Enter button label in universal numpad widget
- preserve local default customer settings when syncing with server
- localize strings in label printer and orders screens
- add logo URL support in various components and enhance receipt printing with company logo

### Bug Fixes

- replace corrupted placeholder character in installment numpad dialog
- clear pending payment state when starting a refund order

### Other Changes

- Add localization for "Apply these values to the current template?" in Arabic, English, and Hebrew
